title: Visit to Baghdad Tech Hub
desc: Members toured Baghdad's leading technology hub, meeting startup founders, AI engineers, and product teams.

title: Ministry of Science Research Labs Tour
desc: Guided tour of government research laboratories exploring applied AI and data science projects.

desc: Inter-university visit to share research findings and establish collaborative project opportunities.

desc: Meeting with officials from Iraq's digital transformation initiative to explore AI adoption in public services.

title: TUBITAK Research Center Visit
desc: Visit to the applied AI research center to explore joint research opportunities and academic exchange.
